name: Short-Sleeve Plaid Shirt
features: Short-sleeve button-down shirt with a subtle multi-color grid plaid pattern. Features a standard point collar, a single open patch pocket on the left chest, and a traditional button placket with contrasting white buttons. The fabric has a slightly textured, breathable look.
pairing_notes: Perfect for a relaxed summer look when paired with khaki chino shorts and leather boat shoes. For a more modern street aesthetic, wear it unbuttoned over a white rib-knit tank with relaxed-fit navy trousers.
